evidence: "Beautiful, uplifting story you can watch over and over."
"This is an inviting story of life in the '40s..."
"I wish there had been a little more character development."

"Love Diana Gabaldon's stories. Have read all of the books in the Outlander series."
"Beautiful, uplifting story you can watch over and over."

"The music is beautiful, the story is wholesome, and it is a window to how things used to be."

summary: The user enjoys uplifting and family-oriented stories, often with historical elements. They show a strong preference for high-quality production and emotional resonance, particularly valuing the works of Diana Gabaldon.
